AFCON 2025: Nigeria Qualify Early as Senegal Stay in Control

Dec 28, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

AFCON 2025 Momentum Builds for Nigeria and Senegal

AFCON 2025 delivered decisive moments as Nigeria sealed early progression to the knockout stage while Senegal continued their steady march at the top of their group.
